parameters.text:
=Welcome to your AI Learning Assistant! 🎓

Commands:
/learn [URL] - Submit a learning material
/quiz - Take a quiz on saved materials
/start - Show this message

=Analyze the following learning material and create a structured summary.

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Content: {{ $json.content }}

Provide a JSON object with:
- keyPoints: array of 5-7 key points
- mainConcepts: array of main concepts
- difficulty: "beginner", "intermediate", or "advanced"

options.systemMessage: You are an expert teacher who analyzes learning materials and creates clear, structured summaries. Focus on extracting the most important information and assessing difficulty accurately.

parameters.text: You have no saved materials yet. Use /learn [URL] to add learning materials first!

=Generate exactly 5 multiple choice quiz questions based on this learning material.

Title: {{ $json.topic }}
Content: {{ $json.original_content }}

You must respond with valid JSON only, no additional text. For each question provide:
- id: Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, Q5
- question: The question text
- options: Array of 4 options labeled A, B, C, D
- correctAnswer: The letter of the correct option (A, B, C, or D)
- explanation: Why the answer is correct (1-2 sentences)

options.systemMessage: You are an expert examiner who creates fair, challenging multiple choice questions. Questions should test understanding, not just memorization. Each question must have exactly 4 options and one clearly correct answer.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: { "questions": [{ "id": "Q1", "question": "What does useState return?", "options": ["A) Value only", "B) Array with value and setter", "C) Object", "D) Function"], "correctAnswer": "B", "explanation": "useState returns an array with the current state value and a setter function." }] }

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: Select a topic for your quiz:
